summary: Implemented ADR 0275 from the synchronized `0.177.96` latest-origin/main worktree by replaying the private Apache Tika document-extraction runtime on docker-runtime-lv3 through the governed in-place live-apply path, re-verifying `/version`, `/tika`, and `/meta` over the private `10.10.10.20:9998` path from both the Proxmox host and the guest itself, and confirming the stale compose-network recovery hardening remains available on the refreshed mainline base.

verification.check: Immutable guest replacement plan for Apache Tika
verification.observed: `make immutable-guest-replacement-plan service=tika` confirmed that `docker-runtime-lv3` remains governed by ADR 0191 immutable guest replacement with classification `edge_and_stateful`, validation mode `preview_guest`, rollback window `180m`, and a narrow exception rule that allows in-place mutation only for documented emergency or reversible changes.

verification.check: Guarded live-apply wrapper blocks without override
verification.observed: `make live-apply-service service=tika env=production` passed canonical-truth, interface-contract, standby-capacity, and service-redundancy preflights, then failed closed at the immutable guest replacement guard with `Immutable guest replacement is required before in-place live apply: tika -> docker-runtime-lv3 [classification=edge_and_stateful, validation=preview_guest, rollback=180m]`.

verification.check: Targeted repo validation from the rebased latest-origin/main worktree
verification.observed: `make syntax-check-tika` passed; `./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-vars data-models health-probes alert-rules workstream-surfaces agent-standards` passed; `make immutable-guest-replacement-plan service=tika` passed; and `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_tika_runtime_role.py tests/test_tika_playbook.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py tests/test_service_id_resolver.py tests/test_docker_runtime_role.py` passed with `47 passed`.

verification.check: Latest-origin/main guarded live apply with documented ADR 0191 exception
verification.observed: `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=tika env=production` completed successfully from the synchronized `0.177.96` worktree with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=115 changed=6 failed=0 skipped=18 rescued=0`. The replay converged cleanly on the refreshed mainline base while retaining the earlier stale compose-network recovery hardening in the role.

verification.check: Host-side private endpoint verification after live apply
verification.observed: `ssh -i /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 ops@100.64.0.1` returned `tcp_connect=ok` for `10.10.10.20:9998`; `GET /version` returned `Apache Tika 3.2.3`; `PUT /tika` with `Accept: text/plain` and `Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8` returned `Hello from Apache Tika.`; and `PUT /meta` with the same payload returned `Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8` plus `X-TIKA:Parsed-By` containing `DefaultParser` and `TextAndCSVParser`.

The guest-local probe on `docker-runtime-lv3` confirmed `/version`, `/tika`, and `/meta`, returned `X-TIKA:Parsed-By` with `org.apache.tika.parser.DefaultParser` and `org.apache.tika.parser.csv.TextAndCSVParser`, verified listeners on both `0.0.0.0:9998` and `[::]:9998`, and showed the `tika` container in a healthy running state.

verification.check: Adjacent runtime health check during latest server-state verification
verification.observed: The same latest-state check found a separate degraded runtime on `docker-runtime-lv3`: `lv3-mattermost` was restarting and `mattermost-openbao-agent` was exited. That drift is outside ADR 0275 and remains for separate repair.

notes: This live apply intentionally used `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true` as the documented ADR 0191 narrow exception because `tika` is hosted on the governed `docker-runtime-lv3` guest; immutable replacement remains the default future rollout path for that guest.

The independent host-side probe must send `Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8` when calling `/tika` and `/meta`; omitting that header makes Tika treat the payload as form data and return an empty parse result.
This branch-local receipt supersedes the earlier `0.177.95` proof and becomes the authoritative latest-origin/main verification for the workstream branch.

Later latest-main validation and read-only server-state checks on the `0.177.101` branch base are recorded separately under `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0275-*` until the exact-main replay can run.

Merge-to-main follow-through still remains on a dedicated integration step: cut the synchronized release, replay the Tika service from merged `main`, refresh the protected top-level `README.md` status summary, and update `versions/stack.yaml` receipt/platform truth from `main` only.
